Notes: 2010 NCAA Division II Championship East Regional: Quarterfinal #3.
Franklin Pierce seeded first. Nyack seeded eighth.
Franklin Pierce ranked No. 2 in USA Today/ESPN/WBCA Coaches Poll.
Winner plays in semifinal #2 at 7:30 p.m. Saturday.
Game.Officials: Tim Crowley,  Mark McClanahan,  Jerry Burgess
